en: American Airlines 355, servicing Chicago and San Francisco,
ko: 아메리칸 항공 355편, 시카고와 샌프란시스코행이 이제 승객 체크인 시작합니다.

en: is now open for passenger check-in. How'd you do it, Frank?
How'd you pass the bar in Louisiana? What are you doing here?
Listen, I'm sorry I put you through all this. You go back to Europe, you're going to die in Pepin Young Prison.
Try to run here in the States, we'll send you back to Atlanta for 50 years.
ko: 여기서 도망치면 50년 동안 애틀랜타로 돌려보낼 거야.

en: I know that. I spent four years trying to arrange your release.
Had to convince my bosses at the FBI and the Attorney General of the United States you wouldn't run.
ko: 네가 도망치지 않을 거라고 FBI 상사와 미국 법무부 장관을 설득해야 했어.

en: Why'd you do it? You're just a kid.
I'm not your kid. You said you were going to Chicago.
My daughter can't see me this weekend. She's gone skiing.
ko: 내 딸은 이번 주말에 나를 못 봐, 스키 타러 갔어.

en: Said she was four years old. You're lying. She was four when I left.
Now she's 15. My wife's been remarried for 11 years.
I see Grace every now and again.
